name: Accuracy-Related Penalty Avoidance

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must either prove substantial authority for their treatment of an item or attach a disclosure statement (Form 8275) to the return explaining the reasonable basis for the position.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces or eliminates the 20% accuracy-related penalty by establishing 'substantial authority' for a tax position or by adequately disclosing the position on the return with a 'reasonable basis'.
